query:
SELECT 
  jobId,
  COUNT(*) as submissions,
  SUM(estimatedCostUsd) as cost,
  MIN(createdAt) as first,
  MAX(createdAt) as last
FROM providerJobLogs
WHERE provider = 'wavespeed' AND createdAt >= '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY jobId
ORDER BY submissions DESC;
